## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? A short description is fine. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal change (no functional change)
- [ ] Chore / tooling

## Related issues

<!-- Link related issues, e.g. "Closes #123" or "Relates to #456". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tests added or updated where relevant (`npm test`)
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant (README / CLAUDE.md / docs)
- [ ] Follows the project code conventions (immutable data, explicit error handling, Zod validation at boundaries, files < 800 lines / functions < 50 lines, no `shell: true`, no `execSync`)
